deep.title: KVarN: Variance-Normalized KV-Cache Quantization Mitigates Error Accumulation in Reasoning Tasks
deep.one_line: 通过方差归一化和Hadamard旋转的KV缓存量化，减少推理任务中的误差累积。

deep.title: VideoKR: Towards Knowledge- and Reasoning-Intensive Video Understanding
deep.one_line: 大规模知识推理视频语料及其构建管线，可直接用于训练智能体视频推理能力

deep.title: Harness-1: Reinforcement Learning for Search Agents with State-Externalizing Harnesses
deep.one_line: 通过外部化状态管理提升RL搜索代理训练效率

radar.title: Masking Stale Observations Helps Search Agents -- Until It Doesn't: A Regime Map and Its Mechanism
radar.one_line: 掩码过时观察对搜索agent有非单调影响，需谨慎管理上下文

radar.title: Cosmos 3: Omnimodal World Models for Physical AI
radar.one_line: 统一多模态世界模型，联合处理语言、图像、视频、音频和动作，为物理AI提供基础

radar.title: Reproducing, Analyzing, and Detecting Reward Hacking in Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning
radar.one_line: 可控环境再现和分析奖励破解，教会奖励设计、检测与调试的工程模式。

radar.title: GrepSeek: Training Search Agents for Direct Corpus Interaction
radar.one_line: 训练搜索agent通过shell命令直接操作语料库，为agent工具使用提供新范式

radar.title: X-Stream: Exploring MLLMs as Multiplexers for Multi-Stream Understanding
radar.one_line: 构建多流视频理解基准，启发Agent的多输入协调能力

radar.title: Mellum2 Technical Report
radar.one_line: 一个开放的12B参数MoE语言模型，专注于软件工程任务。

radar.title: On the Scaling of PEFT: Towards Million Personal Models of Trillion Parameters
radar.one_line: 探索PEFT作为个性化适配器的缩放规律，可用于构建大量个体化agent

radar.title: AdaPlanBench: Evaluating Adaptive Planning in Large Language Model Agents under World and User Constraints
radar.one_line: 自适应规划评估基准，教你如何设计动态交互评测任务。

radar.title: LongTraceRL: Learning Long-Context Reasoning from Search Agent Trajectories with Rubric Rewards
radar.one_line: 利用搜索agent轨迹和rubric奖励通过RL学习长上下文推理

radar.title: TIDE: Proactive Multi-Problem Discovery via Template-Guided Iteration
radar.one_line: 模板引导的迭代框架主动发现多隐藏问题，教会agent自主探索与问题发现模式。
